description_long: This is a long, single-story wooden house with a steeply pitched gable roof and a weathered, rustic appearance. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the roof is covered with wooden shingles. There are several rectangular windows along the length of the house, with a small fenced yard attached to one end. The house features a modest chimney and a covered porch area on one side, suggesting a traditional rural or farmhouse design. The overall structure is elongated, with the main entrance likely located near the fenced yard, and the building sits on a narrow strip of grass.
description: A long, single-story wooden house with a steep gable roof, multiple windows, and a small fenced yard, featuring a rustic, weathered look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, fenced yard, and several windows along the side.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the length of the house, the chimney, and the covered porch area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full length of the house, the rear wall, and the continuation of the wooden siding.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the gable end, two windows, and the fenced yard adjacent to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with a small fenced yard and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
